snippet.title: Hinol Polska Wersja - DziŇõ sińô czujńô jak to zwierzńô (prod. Sickquence)
snippet.description:
https://www.hinol.pl/ - zam√≥w album "Od koŇĄca do poczńÖtku"

"DziŇõ sińô czujńô jak to zwierzńô" to drugi singiel promujńÖcy album Hinola pt. "Od koŇĄca do poczńÖtku". Wydawnictwo ukaŇľe sińô na rynku 25 czerwca 2021 roku nakŇāadem D.A. RECORDS. 

Za produkcjńô "DziŇõ sińô czujńô jak to zwierzńô" odpowiada Sickquence, utw√≥r zmiksowaŇā GRRRACZ. 
Produkcja teledysku: https://www.instagram.com/cb_maciek_lipinski

HINOL na facebooku : 
https://www.facebook.com/HinolPolskaWersja
HINOL na instagramie :
https://www.instagram.com/hinol_polska_wersja

Album: OD KOŇÉCA DO POCZńĄTKU
Artist: HINOL POLSKA WERSJA
Title: DZIŇö SIńė CZUJńė JAK TO ZWIERZńė
Lyrics: HINOL POLSKA WERSJA
Producer:  Sickquence
Vocals records: PrzemysŇāaw ESITE Sitek
Mix/mastering: GRRRACZ
Label: D.A. RECORDS
Support: SSG

Tekst utworu:

Taki juŇľ los, marny los czŇāowieka,
Mńôczy przeszŇāoŇõńá i narzeka lub na coŇõ czeka,
A na gńôbach jest full make-up, 
Tu wielu zadrńôcza mordercza deprecha,
Chńôńá posiadania to nie miŇāoŇõńá wielka,
Motor dziaŇāania to nie tylko pńôga, pamińôtaj! (pamińôtaj),
ZŇāa intencja cel przysŇāania jak powieka,
AŇľ ucieka to co trzymaŇāeŇõ w rńôkach,
Nie wkrńôcaj sińô za bardzo to do doŇāu lot, 
Gdy mniej myŇõlisz wińôcej widzisz nawet pomimo,
Wad i zalet, ty patrz na nie tak jak pies na koŇõńá,
Nie rozkminiaj stale najzwyczajniej czuj radoŇõńá,
Szklanka do poŇāowy peŇāna a nie pusta ziom,
Duma gdy zbyt wielka staje sińô teŇľ pr√≥Ňľna bo,
Wszystko co w nadmiarze tworzy takŇľe toŇľsamoŇõńá twńÖ,
Losu nie ma - myŇõli sńÖ.

To Ňõmieszne, bo w sumie to Ňľycie pieskie,
Wydaje sińô lepsze niŇľ ludzkie Ňľycie na kreskńô,
Jak po piŇāeczkńô, ganiajńÖ po pensjńô,
Z tym, Ňľe pies ma frajdńô a czŇāowiek depresjńô,
I pretensje, wiecznie ma pretensje,
Bo chce wińôcej, wińôcej, gdzie w tym wszystkim sens jest,
Wilki zabijajńÖ z gŇāodu, to nie bestie,
CzŇāowiek bez powodu zabije i nie zje,
M√≥wi sensej - zapisz temat,
Za duŇľe pragnienia, wszńôdzie dobrze gdzie nas nie ma,
Jak sińô ma - to sińô ma, juŇľ sińô tego nie docenia,
Skomlemy jak szczeniak co zostaŇā bez wŇāaŇõciciela,
A nasza cela, to tylko przytulny dom,
Losu nie ma - myŇõli sńÖ.

(REFREN)
I tak patrzńô na mojego psa, ma juŇľ tyle lat, czas tak pńôdzi, Ňľe nie wierzńô, 
Czas tak pńôdzi, Ňľe nie wierzńô (dobry pies),
Nie patrzy do tyŇāu ani w dal, nie wie co to Ňľal, spokojnie wdycha powietrze, Ňľyje,
DziŇõ sińô czujńô  jak to zwierzńô.  

booking koncertowy: 575874278
e-mail koncertowy: mitchclips@gmail.com

snippet.title: Mocz w ustach - kretyŇĄskie terapie. Historia Bez Cenzury
snippet.description:
KsińÖŇľka: http://bit.ly/jezdziecbez 

Koszulka: https://hobbywear.pl/ 

JakiŇõ czas temu przygotowaliŇõmy dla Was odcinek o dawnych sposobach leczenia. JeŇõli ktoŇõ tego odcinka jeszcze nie widziaŇā, to teraz jest wyŇõmienita okazja, aby nadrobińá zalegŇāoŇõci:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ajkhpqe2sZ0
Dzisiaj bowiem mamy dla Was kolejnńÖ porcjńô gŇāupich i obleŇõnych terapii z dawnych czas√≥w.

snippet.title: 7-minutowa medytacja, kt√≥rńÖ moŇľesz zrobińá zawsze i wszńôdzie. Intencja. Koncentracja. Relaks.
snippet.description:

snippet.description:

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. #AnneMarie #NiallHoran #OurSong

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UK‚Äôs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-M‚Äôs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, ‚ÄėSpeak Your Mind‚Äô which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UK‚Äôs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

snippet.title: JAKUB MODER NA KONFERENCJI: ‚ÄěBrak powoŇāania mnie wtedy dotknńÖŇā, ale nie zaŇāamaŇā‚ÄĚ
snippet.description:
W drugim dniu zgrupowania ‚ÄěbiaŇāo-czerwonych‚ÄĚ przed mistrzostwami Europy UEFA EURO 2020 w bazie reprezentacji Polski odbyŇāa sińô kolejna konferencja prasowa, w trakcie kt√≥rej na pytania dziennikarzy odpowiedziaŇā pomocnik naszej druŇľyny oraz angielskiego Brighton Hove & Albion FC ‚Äď Jakub Moder. Zapraszamy na zapis naszej transmisji ‚Äěna Ňľywo‚ÄĚ z Centrum Medialnego przy Hotelu Remes Sport & Spa w podpoznaŇĄskiej Opalenicy.

snippet.title: Audi RS e-tron GT v Porsche Taycan v Tesla Model S: DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click the following link and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson! http://bit.ly/-Help-Me-carwow
.............................................................

Check out RSymons RSEV - https://www.youtube.com/c/RSymonsLtd

Check out Yiannimize - https://www.youtube.com/c/Yiannimize

How‚Äôs this for an absolutely EPIC electric car showdown? We‚Äôve finally got our hands on the all-new Audi RS e-tron GT, and it‚Äôs going up against the Porsche Taycan Turbo and the Tesla Model S Performance!

So how do they compare on paper? Well first up we‚Äôve got Mat in the Audi - their most powerful road-going car to date, no less! Powered by two electric motors, it can put down 646hp and 830Nm, while it also weighs in at 2,340kg. Alongside him we have Yianni in the Taycan Turbo, which also comes with two electric motors but the ability to put down slightly more power, so it can produce 687hp and 850Nm of torque. In terms of weight, it‚Äôs almost identical to the Audi, weighing in at 2,380kg. 

And then finally we have the Tesla. It may cost a fair bit less than the Audi & Porsche (¬£70k vs ¬£112k & ¬£116k respectively), but it easily puts down the most power! With (you guessed it) two electric motors, it has the ability to produce 778hp and an epic 1,140Nm of torque! What‚Äôs more, it‚Äôs also the lightest car here, with a total weight of 2,316kg.

So, based on that, it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Tesla, right?! There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

.............................................................

Compare the five best offers by price, location and dealer ratings and choose the one that‚Äôs right for you ‚Äď no hassle, no haggling, just a great deal.¬†

snippet.title: Lewandowski, Mueller, kŇāaniamy im sińô obu! A "Giki" w swoim Ňľywiole! AŇľ do ostatniej akcji meczu...
snippet.description: #PrawdaFutbolu #MobilnyMagazynLOTTO - Roman KoŇātoŇĄ o rekordowym Robercie Lewandowskim i tym, kt√≥ry stanńÖŇā na jego drodze, Rafale Gikiewiczu. "Giki" m√≥wi: "Ten mecz to Ňõwietna reklama polskiej piŇāki. Na murawie byŇāo trzech Polak√≥w". Bramkarz Augsburga zaznacza: "Jestem dumny, Ňľe dzielńô boiska Bundesligi z Robertem Lewandowskim. Sam ŇľyczyŇāem mu rekordu, a zarazem chciaŇāem zrobińá wszystko, aby go powstrzymańá. Jestem zawodowcem". Jeden z najlepszy bramkarzy w Niemczech przyznaŇā: "Dla mnie kadra to drzazga. Po takim sezonie chciaŇāem i powinienem byńá powoŇāany. Bńôdńô jednak kibicowaŇā. Robert niech napńôdza druŇľynńô, a ta niech wyjdzie z grupy w finaŇāach EURO". Walka RL9 o rekord goli w sezonie Bundesligi z Gerdem Muellerem, to coŇõ co napńôdza futbol. Szef "Kickera", Joerg Jakob napisaŇā kilka dni temu: "KŇāaniamy im sińô obu". Zapraszam na wielki live, w kt√≥rym pojawiŇā sińô teŇľ PaweŇā KryszaŇāowicz, kt√≥ry sam graŇā w Bundeslidze i do dziŇõ pilnie jńÖ strzeli. "Tam mentalnoŇõńá jest taka, Ňľe chcńÖ wygrańá zawsze i wszńôdzie. I wŇāaŇõnie w koŇĄc√≥wce sezonu pokazuje to Bayern, majńÖc juŇľ zapewniony tytuŇā mistrza Niemiec. A i tak wbili 6 goli Gladbach, 2 Freiburgowi i 5 Augsburgowi. Cieszńô sińô, Ňľe aŇľ 5 strzeliŇā Robert, bo to pozwoliŇāo mu pobińá rekord Muellera".

snippet.title: The Weeknd - The Weeknd ‚Äď Save Your Tears (Live on The 2021 Billboard Music Awards)
snippet.description:
‚ÄúSave Your Tears‚ÄĚ (Live at The 2021 Billboard Music Awards) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD 

‚ĖļSubscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 

‚ĖļGet exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com 

‚ĖļFollow The Weeknd:
https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Directed by Alex Lill
Produced by Brendan Garrett
Production Company:  Bucket Pictures 

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

#TheWeeknd #SaveYourTears #AfterHours

snippet.title: What Are You Doing With Your Life? The Tail End
snippet.description:
Gain a new perspective on your life with our "Calendar & Timeline of Your Life Posters":
https://kgs.link/N3Ksfqvp

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-tailend/

Wrapping your mind around your life is pretty hard, because you are up to your neck in it. It's like trying to understand the ocean while learning how to swim. On most days you are busy just keeping your head above water. So it is not easy to figure out what to do with your life and how to spend your time.

There are a million distractions. Your family, friends and romantic partners, boring work, and exciting projects. Video games to play and books to read. And then there is your couch that somebody needs to lie on. It‚Äôs easy to get lost. So let us take a step back and take a look at your life from the outside.

Jan Niezbendny & WHOREkiestra - laureaci pierwszej nagrody audycji "Akademia Rozrywki" w Programie Trzecim Polskiego Radia za najlepszy utw√≥r kabaretowy. 
Tw√≥rcy internetowych hit√≥w , w tym m.in. "To byŇāo chyba wesele" , "Wyjeb..ne mam na ZUS", "Spotkajmy sińô przy groszku". P√≥Ňāfinalista talent show "Must Be The Music".

jako najlepszńÖ pŇāytńô roku 2013.
 Quasi zesp√≥Ňā, quasi kabaret. Debiut wydany pod zaskakujńÖcym tytuŇāem "The best of" to zaskakujńÖca, 
bezkompromisowa opowieŇõńá w formie sŇāuchowiska radiowego o Janie Niezbendnym: 
"bezrobotnym, podstarzaŇāym szowinistńÖ z nadwagńÖ, kt√≥ry ma 38 lat i nadal mieszka z mamńÖ... ŇĽyje z jej renty, kt√≥rńÖ sukcesywnie trwoni, imprezujńÖc...".
Wkr√≥tce ukaŇľe sińô drugi album formacji, "Greatest Hits" - utw√≥r "Upadek jest jego zapowiedzińÖ.

snippet.title: Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem
Stream/DL: https://atlantic.lnk.to/HeartbreakAnthemID

Subscribe for more official content from Galantis: https://BigBeat.lnk.to/GalantisSubscribe

Follow Galantis
Facebook: http://smarturl.it/GalantisFb

Twitter: https://twitter.com/LittleMix

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I don‚Äôt hold no grudges, promise this ain‚Äôt a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex (again)
I didn‚Äôt want to call but there‚Äôs this pain in my chest
And thanks to you I‚Äôm wearing out this bulletproof vest but I‚Äôll be ok, I‚Äôm ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: 25. Nie jestem prezydentem
snippet.description:
I wchodzi on, kierownik podw√≥rka. 

‚ĖļFanpage: https://www.facebook.com/StopChamWarszawa

JeŇõli ktoŇõ chciaŇāby wesprzeńá nasze dziaŇāania:

‚ĖļPayPal https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/StopChamWarszawa

P R Z E C Z Y T A J    Z A N I M    S K O M E N T U J E S Z 


1. Art. 26 pkt. 3 ust. 3 "KierujńÖcemu pojazdem zabrania sińô jazdy wzdŇāuŇľ po chodniku lub przejŇõciu dla pieszych."

Na chodniku nie stawia sińô znak√≥w drogowych bo to chodnik. Nie ma znaku drogowego zakazujńÖcego jazdńô wzdŇāuŇľ po chodniku poniewaŇľ.... jest to chodnik. 
Zakaz jazdy wzdŇāuŇľ po chodniku i przejŇõciu dla pieszych zapisany jest w Prawie o Ruchu Drogowym (powyŇľej)

2. Zgodnie z art. 47 PORD zabroniony jest post√≥j na chodniku z dala od krawńôdzi jezdni. Z dala od krawńôdzi, tj. np.: za sŇāupkami, trawnikiem, drzewem lub innym pojazdem. 

3. WińôkszoŇõńá zaprezentowanych nagraŇĄ przekazujemy na policjńô.

4. Nie planujemy obklejańá szyb karnymi naklejkami, m.in. ze wzglńôdu na kwestie prawne z tym zwińÖzane.

5. Tablice rejestracyjne nie sńÖ danymi osobowymi. Dlatego ich nie cenzurujemy.

6. NiewaŇľne, Ňľe jest szeroko i zmieszczńÖ sińô ‚Äě3 w√≥zki dla dzieci i 3 TIRy‚ÄĚ. Chodniki nie sńÖ przystosowane, by staŇāy na nich samochody. Auta deformujńÖ uŇāoŇľonńÖ kostkńô, a pŇāyty chodnikowe pńôkajńÖ i ruszajńÖ sińô. Koszty naprawy ponoszńÖ p√≥Ňļniej podatnicy.

7. Tak, wzywamy StraŇľ MiejskńÖ jeŇõli mamy do czynienia z nielegalnym parkowaniem.

8. Nie interesujńÖ nas Ňľadne niuanse formalno-prawne, spory, niesnaski, brak miejsc parkingowych ani to, Ňľe ktoŇõ sińô Ňõpieszy, bo ŇõpieszńÖ sińô wszyscy i Ňľe ‚Äěwszyscy tak robińÖ," bo wszyscy tak nie robińÖ. 

9. Wiemy, Ňľe jazda rowerem po chodniku, czy przechodzenie pieszych w miejscach niedozwolonych to teŇľ jest problem, ale obecnie tym sińô nie zajmujemy.

stopchamwarszawa@gmail.com

snippet.title: Eurovision Song Contest 2021 - Grand Final - Live Stream
snippet.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 will take place on 22 May. 26 Acts will perform in the final of which 6 countries are already pre-qualified. This are host country The Netherlands and the so called 'Big 5' consisting of France, Germany, Italy, Spain and the United Kingdom. Ten acts will qualify from the first-Semi-Final and the remaining ten acts will qualify from the Second Semi-Final. 

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/

snippet.title: 'Friends' Reunion Exclusive: Cast Reflects on Beloved Show Before "Emotional" Special | PEOPLE
snippet.description:
To celebrate the highly anticipated reunion of one of the most beloved shows in television history, the cast of Friends (Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, and David Schwimmer) sit down for this exclusive interview, talking about their favorite memories and why they'll always be there for one another.

Friends: The Reunion premieres May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: Kwiat JabŇāoni - "Przezroczysty Ňõwiat"
snippet.description:
W naszym klipie do piosenki ‚ÄěPrzezroczysty Ňõwiat‚ÄĚ zostaŇāa przedstawiona relacja z caŇāego dnia, ktoŐĀry speŐ®dzilisŐĀmy w Poznaniu organizujńÖc pewnego rodzaju eksperyment spoŇāeczny, performance. Wieczorem, gdy juzŐá wszystko byŇāo gotowe, weszlisŐĀmy do szklanego pokoju rozstawionego wsp√≥lnie z naszńÖ ekipńÖ przed Teatrem Polskim i przez godzineŐ® patrzylisŐĀmy na ludzi przechodzaŐ®cych i zatrzymujaŐ®cych sieŐ® obok nas. Ich reakcje nie byŇāy wyrezŐáyserowane ‚Äď wszystko co widzicie na teledysku jest wynikiem spontanicznych emocji. Kochajmy sieŐ®, rozmawiajmy wieŐ®cej, patrzmy sobie w oczy.

snippet.title: Januszek okrzyczaŇā kierownika PawŇāa! [ZŇāomowisko PL]
snippet.description:
OglńÖdaj wszystkie odcinki w discovery+ w Playerze:
https://player.pl/discovery-plus?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=discovery&utm_campaign=disco_wew
Subskrybuj kanaŇā Discovery Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/MocOdkrywania/?sub_confirmation=1
Tej wiosny widzowie po raz ostatni zobaczńÖ ukochanego Marka "Krzykacza" PawŇāowskiego, kt√≥ry niespodziewanie zmarŇā 31 grudnia 2020. Na otwarcie nowego sezonu programu "ZŇāomowisko PL" tw√≥rcy przygotowali odcinek specjalny - wspomnienie "Kr√≥la ZŇāomu".
Bohaterowie powspominajńÖ Krzykacza, wr√≥cimy do scen melancholijnych. jak i tych zabawnych. Marek byŇā przede wszystkim autentyczny - przed kamerami zachowywaŇā sińô tak, jak w Ňľyciu prywatnym. Niech to bńôdzie trybut dla "Kr√≥la ZŇāomu", kt√≥remu tej korony juŇľ chyba nikt nigdy nie odbierze...
Marek PawŇāowski sw√≥j pseudonim "Krzykacz" zyskaŇā przez sw√≥j donoŇõny gŇāos. ByŇā znany fanom jako "Kr√≥l ZŇāomu" z Pruszkowa. snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.title: Robert Lewandowski - Top 5 Most Unexpected Goals 20/21 so far
snippet.description:
Enjoy Robert Lewandowski's most unexpected goals from this season so far
‚Ėļ Sub now: https://redirect.bundesliga.com/_bwCS

Here‚Äôs how Robert Lewandowski scores from almost impossible positions! The Polish super striker now not only shares the record for the most goals scored in a single season, he even conjures up real magic when it comes to scoring. Left foot, right foot, tight angle, incredible header - Robert Lewandowski simply doesn't care. Using factors such as distance from goal, shooting angle and reaction time, AWS can calculate the value named xG - expected goals. If the value is low, it's unlikely a goal will be scored ‚Äď and as a result we can identify his most unexpected goals. What do you think are the qualities making Robert Lewandowski capable of scoring from almost any position? And do you think, he will score again on this final matchday of the season?
